strategies.detection: Input validation at API entry; Postgres client surface for 5xx and unique-constraint violations.
strategies.response: Return 400 on validation; retry with exponential backoff on 503; regenerate slug on unique_violation up to 5 attempts.
strategies.surfacing: Structured JSON log entry per error; HTTP status code to client; oncall page on persistent 5xx.

strategies.detection: SMTP client surface for relay errors.
strategies.response: Enqueue for retry with backoff up to 5 attempts; alert oncall after final failure.
strategies.surfacing: Structured JSON log; admin dashboard notification badge; oncall page on persistent failure.
